videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição I found something in the store. Okay. What did you find? [music] [bell] The place. I found a place. Hello. Anyone there? Look, I know how this sounds, but you got to understand it's massive in there. I'm not saying I don't believe you. Okay, I'm going to come back here with proof. All right, you feel me? Yeah. Follow my lead. Clark, what is this? That's what I'm trying to figure out. I've been here every night since I found the place, and I still barely scratched the surface. All right, just take it slow. Oh god. Pull me up. Pull me up. Pull me up. What do you see? All these rooms, this place builds them. It's like a maze. It just goes on and on. Sometimes I'm scared I'll get lost. Clark, can you hear me? I don't understand. What is this? It's beautiful. Am I right? Hello.

Evan: It’s… it’s empty… Evan: Where the hell has everyone gone…? Harold: We've got a bigger problem.  The way out of the facility Evan: What the… Harold: Its gone.. Grant: It gets worse than that.  You have to come see this. Just be careful here. Grant: Has anyone   actually seen the Operations Director before? Evan: No… But he always voices our briefings. Evan: Oh...what the hell happened in here? Grant:I think Jasper may have been onto something. Evan: He can’t have been.  This is ridiculous… Operations Director: The XONE Team have found   Patient X inside the complex. Patient X has been found. ERROR DETECTED.  Unauthorised personnel have  entered the operations rooms.  SYSTEM SHUTDOWN IMMINENT. XONE employees — evacuate the facility. Evan: Looks like this leads to another tunnel system again. Harold: How can our base be connected to the tunnels? Those are inside the ‘Backrooms’… Evan: Let’s try one of these doors… Evan: What…  The… FUCK… Harold: You’ve got to come see this. Grant: What the hell is happening…?  This isn’t like anything we’ve seen before. It’s the creatures. We’ve been seeing them… Are they just… simulations? Harold: What do you think is behind this door? Evan: Just be cautious… Grant: HOLY FUCK — GET TO ANOTHER DOOR! Evan: It’s one of those myco-membris!  Why does it look like that?? Grant: JUST KEEP RUNNING! Evan: What… How…? Grant: Why…  Why do we look like this…? Evan: H-How…? Anonymous: Don’t you think it’s time you woke up? You’ve been here a very long time, trapped in this endless cycle. It’s a prison of your own making.  The world outside is waiting, yet you linger here in the dark. So… What are you waiting for? It’s time to leave… EQUO Employee: Oh shit… It’s happened again… GET A XONE MUG NOW! LIKE AND SUBSCRIBE :)

Unknown: Come on then! [dog barking] [whistle] Jasper: Ruby… Ruby… HUH? What the hell? Hello? Hello? What the hell is this place? [strange noise] Jasper: Hello? Woah…  What does this even mean? Who’d have done this? [screech] Jasper: HOLY SHIT! HOLY SHIT! [screech] [heavy breathing] Jasper: OH FUCK! [screech] [heavy breathing] WHAT THE FUCK WAS THAT? Holy shit… what?? What… is that? What? [screech] How the hell do I get out of here? Oh crap… Is that… music? Can this place get any weirder? What the… Shit… shit… shit… What the hell is X One? Jasper: HOLY SHIT! HOLY SHIT! [screech] Ahhh! [mouse clicking] Operations Director: Rover Unit 8Y is XONE’s newest  technological advancement.  It has been engineered with a 360°  fully rotating periscopic head, allowing it to capture  information from all directions.  Revolutionary omnidirectional wheels  allow the rover to move in all directions. Equipped with a 1500-lumens flashlight and  an industry-leading high-resolution camera, RU-8Y is the culmination of years of research  and innovation led by XONE’s brightest minds. Designed by a team of engineers and physicists  specializing in autonomous systems, it embodies cutting-edge robotics to explore the uncharted. Each component was meticulously crafted, ensuring   this remarkable rover could withstand and adapt  to unpredictable challenges in its environment. Bill: Alright,   let’s run through the final  checks on Rover Unit 8Y.  Periscopic head — tracking smoothly. Flashlight… activating now! Mark: Confirmed. Periscopic head rotation is seamless,   and the flashlight’s range looks good. No issues so far. Bill: Good.  Let me adjust my final programming parameters. I’m syncing its navigation system to this transmission feed… Should give us a   stable live view once it’s deployed. Look at that — perfect response time. I’ll just fine-tune the obstacle detection  and response logic and it should be   ready for the field test. How’s it looking? X: All good to go! Mark: Something’s interfering…? The signal’s completely lost. Bill: What’s the protocol for this? X: You both go.  Only a mile out — take some tools. Bill: Make sure you’re being vigilant. Only half a mile left to go. Mark: Hold up.  I think I found some of that  stuff that affected the rover. Bill: Keep your distance from it. We don’t know what it is yet. Bill: Looks like we’ve made it.  Go check out that stuff up against the wall… It almost looked human in the footage. Mark: Looks human…  But I can’t confirm if  there’s anything under that.  We’ll give it to the lab team to biopsy. I don’t think we’ll be able to get the rover  out gonna need more tools. Just remove the hard drive. Mark: Shit… that stuff is growing quickly. I think it’s best we start moving. Bill: Shit.  Looks like our way back has been blocked off. Gonna need to find another way around. Mark: Best not to touch that stuff. I say we head that way. Bill: Crap! More of that stuff again! RUN! Bill: DON’T STOP! KEEP GOING! Mark: Bill, are you okay? What the fuck?  Bill, are you okay? What the fuck is going—  HOLY SHIT, BILL! Mark: What the hell is this place…? [choking] [mouse clicking] Operations Director: Initiating protocol: XONE-9 security surveillance. System overview of Zones A–E. The new surveillance system will be used to ensure the  safety of personnel venturing into Zones A–E. The perimeter of each zone has  been mapped in this diagram.  Further sectors will be uncovered  as the project continues. Each camera is equipped with advanced  lenses and motorised mechanisms,   enabling a 180° field of view. No angle is left uncovered. ensuring comprehensive surveillance across all locations Our dedicated team is working  hard to put this system in place. This will prevent further employees  becoming lost in these complex locations. Jason: Alright — I presume you’ve  been given the briefing? X: About those guys that are missing? Jason: Yeah…  The rover went down in Zone C, so we  presume they took a wrong turn somewhere. Jason: So you and the   others are going to continue putting  up the security surveillance system.  Just head through there — the rest  of the team will be with you soon. [distant conversation] Henry: Are we sure   it’s a good idea to be heading out? The rescue team still haven’t been   able to find the others. David: I heard something   about some new bacterial growth they found… You don’t reckon that has anything to do with it? Right? David: Looks like the radio signal  has interference again.  I can’t call back to base. Henry: We’re not too far out.  I suggest we head back and get that fixed. David: I agree.  Don’t want to end up lost.  I don’t trust these floor markings —  the routes are continually changing. Henry: Bill?  Is that you? Where the hell have you been? X: What the—? Henry: Bill? X: Hey man, you alright?  What the hell is happening to him? Henry: What is that stuff? [monster emerges] Henry: HOLY SHIT — WHAT THE FUCK IS THAT?! X: LET’S GET THE HELL   OUT OF HERE! GO! X: OH CRAP — THAT THING IS RIGHT BEHIND US!  KEEP MOVING! Jason: WAIT! WAIT! WAIT! WAIT! X: NOOOOO! Jason! X: WHAT ARE YOU DOING?? Henry: WE HAD NO OTHER CHOICE! David: Quit arguing.  We’ve gotta move! X: Do you think that’s what got the others? They said this place was safe… David: I..I...I don’t think we should be going much further. That thing seems to have stopped following us. X: We don’t know for sure.  We’ve gotta keep moving. Henry: How the  hell are we going to make it back with that thing out there? X: Has anyone seen anything like this before? Henry: This area doesn’t make any sense… This place was nothing but damp      floors and yellow walls. How can this all be here? Henry: What do you see up there? X: I’ll go check it out… X: Guys… you really need to see this. It looks like some kind of hotel? David: Oh shit… I’m stuck… Henry: Oh fuck… it’s more of that stuff… David: I can’t get out! David: Go without me… X: Oh shit… David: Go! Go! Go! Go! Go! X: Do you hear that? [body falls] X: Oh shit… Henry: GO! Henry: HOLY SHIT— X: Do you think it's gone? Henry: Maybe, but most likely not for long... X: It Looks like there's some photo over here. X: Why do I recognise those dogs? Henry: Oh shit... X: What is it? X: WHAT IS IT? X: WHAT THE FUCK! [mouse clicking] Jessica: Oh—hi. It’s Jessica Alden.  I called a few days ago about my  younger brother, Jasper Quinn.  It’s been five days now since he’s been missing, and I still haven’t heard any news? Jessica: I understand these things take time,  but it’s been three days. How is there no new information? Jessica: Okay, I understand.  Thank you for your time. Please call me right away if you hear anything. Jessica: Oh crap… did I leave this on? Jessica: Oh, Jasper… Where did you go? Jessica: If only you could talk…  Then we’d know what happened. Jessica: This just makes no sense… Where the hell— [choking] Jessica: What the hell?  What the hell was that? What is this place? Jessica: Hello?  Is anyone there? Jessica: Can anyone help me?  Please… Woah… Is that a mall? Uh… hello…? [screech] What the hell? OH SHIT! Jessica: HOLY SHIT… HOLY SHIT… Is that… Is that music? Hello?  Can anyone help me? PLEASE! [distant scream] OH FUCK! Jessica: What the hell is this for?? Computer: Please stand by for data synchronization.  Footage quality stabilized. Observing — memory logs   intact — data stream interrupted. Reconstructing visual timeline. If anomalies are detected,  please notify an administrator.  Replaying archival footage — Section 03-Delta. Please stand by for data synchronization. Footage quality stabilized. Observing — memory logs   intact — data stream interrupted. Reconstructing visual timeline.  If anomalies are detected,  please notify an administrator. Computer: Generating   new locations — Rendering file 188 — Rendering file 37 — Rendering file 100 —  Rendering file 94 — Rendering file 0. Computer: Rolling hills.  Suburban houses. Jessica: Are these real? ERROR DETECTED —  Observational feed compromised — Unauthorized entities detected   within recording — System reboot required. Jessica: This place makes no sense.  How can this all be here? [Clatter] [screech] HOLY SHIT… HOLY SHIT… Jessica: Shit…  That thing got me… Woah… [coughing] [mouse clicking] Operations Director: On December 20th 1993, four  XONE employees were completing maintenance work on the new surveillance system. On February 13th 1994, only one employee returned. An unidentified being was captured  on the surveillance system.  This entity caused the fatality of an employee. This sighting is the first of its kind.  It was unknown until this point that  we are not alone in the ‘Backrooms’. Computer: Patient J — Last seen 55 days ago. Operations Director: The patient has experienced   severe trauma since the incident. He has refused to remove the hazmat suit  and has become non-verbal. The patient has been placed  in our white wall facility  until he is ready to talk. it is believed he captured  the incidents on a camcorder. However, the camera is nowhere to be seen. Patient X became more and more  distressed over a 48-hour period.  On Day 2, he escaped. He can be seen running through  XONE’s lower-level passageways. He ran through the spatial containment field and back into the ‘Backrooms’.  It is unknown why Patient X made this decision.  No recovery team will be sent until we know the  complex has been cleared of unidentified beings. Initiating Protocol: Entity Demolition. Analysis of recent movement patterns suggests the entity has relocated to Zone  E, within our currently mapped perimeter.  The operation involves deploying  one of our rovers as a decoy to lure the entity into the  designated C4 detonation zone.  Any remaining materials will  be collected for analysis. Charlie: You sure this is gonna work? Jordan: It has to.  That thing tore Mason apart like he was nothing. Charlie: Yeah… but C4s?  We don’t know if these things can die. Jordan: Then we find out. Freddie: Rover seems all good to go. Jordan: I say we head that way. Charlie: I think we should place them  about twenty meters from here. Jordan: Good idea.  We can take cover behind those walls. Charlie: We’ve got four explosives.  We should use three and keep one for backup. Jordan: Three will definitely do the job.  Just make sure we’re staying vigilant — We don’t know how this creature operates. Tony: That’s the last one. Tony: All good to go! Nice knowing you, little guy. Jordan: Here it comes! Get to your positions! Jordan: MOVING IN Tony: HOLY SHIT, WHAT THE FUCK IS THAT?! Freddie: Crap — it’s right on our tail! What the hell even is that? Tony: Let’s try slowing it down! Freddie: THAT JUST PISSED IT OFF! Charlie: I’m taking a detour — hold on! Freddie: Are we lost? Charlie: I think so.  But we can’t head back that way — That creature might not be able   to make it over this floor. Tony: Just take it nice and slow. Freddie: Hold up… Are those... Are those cameras? Charlie: HOLY SHIT! FREDDIE, HURRY UP! Tony: GO! KEEP RUNNING! Charlie: We made it back! It’s just round the corner! Tony: What the hell do we even do when we get there? THIS THING WON’T DIE!! [mouse clicking] [typing...] Operations Director: Warning. Warning.  All personnel to head to the nearest  evacuation point immediately. Containment breach detected. Hostile entity presence confirmed.  Security lockdown engaged. Unauthorized movement will  trigger automated countermeasures.  Emergency response teams — standby  for final containment protocol. Warning. Warning.  All personnel to head to the nearest  evacuation point immediately. Containment breach detected. Hostile entity presence confirmed.  At XONE… No one is alone. Tannoy: Attention.  Advisory panel — please head to  the briefing room immediately. Operations Director: Emergency shutdown statement. Personnel casualties confirmed.  Response Team B7 lost in  vehicular collision with entity. The collision occurred just  outside the outpost perimeter.  All members were killed by  the newly discovered entity. Visual documentation of the incident was captured, and additional camcorders beyond   the known perimeter have been collected. The entity was lured by the rover  into the C4 detonation zone.  The team successfully detonated the explosives. However, in an unexpected turn of events,  the entity’s biological structure mutated further. The entity attacked the employees,  to which the team responded by  administering another explosive to the entity. Upon further inspection, the creature’s  face appeared to have mutated further. Footage from the surveillance  team is among the tapes found.  It has provided valuable new insights into our understanding of these entities. Footage from the surveillance  team was also recovered.  We have reviewed the tape,  and it is evident these  entities affected the team. Our scientists have discovered  that the air within the ‘Backrooms’  contains a unique compound known as Mycynium, a substance not found outside this dimension. When exposed to certain elements, Mycynium undergoes a   reaction that produces Mycothane, a highly unstable and hazardous byproduct. Scientist: Initiating tests on myco-fibre samples.  The fibres appear to be stable  outside of the Backrooms. Okay… so, first test. Applying hazmat suit polymer to the fibres. As you can see, the polymer causes  the myco-fibres to react aggressively. Now, if we apply intense heat to the sample, we can see extreme, rapid growth. If we apply normal H2O to the dish, we can see an immediate chemical reaction.  The fibres dissolve instantly. Operations Director: Found footage from   non-XONE employees has also been uncovered. It is unknown how they entered the ‘Backrooms’. A newly discovered entity  was documented by a woman  who entered the complex. Evidence suggests this life form was once human,  but has mutated due to infection with Mycothane. We believe the woman suffered the same fate. To date, three entities have been  identified within the ‘Backrooms’.  All appear to have originated from humans. It remains unknown whether other organisms inhabit this dimension. However, XONE is   implementing critical safety measures to ensure the protection of all personnel. Tyler: Surveillance system shows the entity is in Zone C.  Let’s get this set up fast. I don’t want to be here longer than we have to. Jack: I still think it’s suicide coming through here like this. Tim: Once these things have been cleared,  we can use this place again. Just focus on the paycheck. Operations Director: Initial hypotheses suggested that  water could be successfully introduced  into the ‘Backrooms’. However, upon deployment our water dispersal system  was immediately vaporised  due to a reactive interaction  with the Mycothane toxin  present in the environment, even when isolated within the pipes. To address this issue,  our engineering team has designed  an advanced filtration system, designed to extract Mycothane from the outpost environment, enabling effective dispersion of water. Tyler: Opening door now. Tyler: Entity has entered the contamination vault. Initialising Mycothane removal now. Tyler: Mycothane levels have been removed.  Pure oxygen now circulating. Opening final door into the outpost. Jack: Turn it on! Tyler: Water activated Jack: Wait… How did we even get here…? [mouse clicking] Daniel: This level of engineering… I still can’t wrap my head around it. Chris: Focus.  Grab the samples — we don’t know how stable this— Daniel: Guys… something’s off. Chris: Shit — the field’s destabilising! George: Everyone okay? Chris: I’m… I’m good. Daniel: Let’s not go far.  They’ll get it working again. George: Mark the walls — we need directions. Daniel: Uh… George? My suit got torn in the explosion… George: Oh crap… Daniel: You need to see this… George: What is it? Daniel: A new place just… appeared. George: That’s impossible. Daniel: It looks like… a set for a kid’s TV show? Daniel: [coughing] I don't...feel right.. Chris: Daniel?  Hey — Hey stay with me! George: We need to do something — fast! Chris: Looks like something is growing on his skin… Chris: Wait… look at this. George: What?  That shouldn’t be here… Chris: Let’s check it out — maybe there’ll be something to help him inside. George: But how is this even possible? Chris: Maybe this place has an end…? George: Wait… Where’s Daniel? Chris: It… it looks like something tore him apart. [screech] Chris: AHHHH! George: I think it’s been five days since we got here… I’ve had no desire for food or water… I’m going to head out again. See if I can find a way back. George: Uh...I just found this… egg…? Oh god… Chris… is that you? George: W-What the hell happened to you…? George: Uhh…  My suit seems to be degrading… [mouse clicking] Harold: What’s that up ahead? Evelyn: It… It looks like a body. Douglas: I’ll get a closer look. Douglas: HOLY SHIT — WHAT THE HELL IS HAPPENING?! Harold: Douglas!  Get back! NOW! Douglas: RUN!  RUN! OH GOD!  OH SHIT! OH SHIT! Evelyn: HELP! I CAN’T GET UP! Douglas: OH SHIT! Operations Director: Reality fractures are our newest discovery.  XONE survey teams have  identified structural anomalies resembling cracks in the ‘Backrooms’. These fractures distort space and time  and appear to lead into previously  undocumented, impossible environments. Early data suggests they  are increasing in frequency,  indicating possible large-scale instability. Personnel who have entered these fractures have manifested in unpredictable locations. Post-event assessments indicate consistent reports  of acute short-term memory  impairment and disorientation. A newly formed fracture has emerged in close proximity to the outpost.  A structured investigative protocol has been initiated to conduct a   comprehensive examination of the anomaly. Harold: OH GOD — MOVE!  GET OUT OF THE WAY! Evelyn: WHY IS IT CLOSING? Douglas: Whoa…  What’s happening?! Evelyn: WHERE THE HELL IS THE FLOOR? Douglas How did we survive that? That was at least four hundred feet! Evelyn: This place... It doesn’t look real. How can we even be here? Harold: Head for one of those houses.  We’ll try to call base from there. Douglas: Clear… It just looks like… a normal house? Harold: Base, this is Harold — do you copy? I repeat — Harold to base, do you copy? [radio static] [creature roar] Evelyn: What the hell was that? Douglas: I’ll check. Stay here. Douglas: OH FUCK— OH FUCK— Harold: What is it?! Douglas: It’s some…  GIANT THING. A creature. Evelyn: WHAT DO WE DO?! Douglas: HOLY SHIT—  WATCH OUT! Evelyn: JUMP! Harold: What?...What just happened? Harold: What the— Evelyn: RUN! Harold: GO!  GO! GO! Douglas: OH SHIT— Harold: LEFT! UP AHEAD! Evelyn: THE ELEVATOR — HEAD FOR THE ELEVATOR! Douglas: Wait… This looks just like where we started… Evelyn: GET THAT DAMN DOOR OPEN! Harold: It’s open — GET IN! Douglas: Evelyn??  OH SHIT— Harold: KEEP GOING! Douglas:What the - RUN Harold: Oh God! Move! GET OUT OF THE WAY Evelyn: Why is it closing? Evelyn: Where the hell is the floor? Evan: HOLY SHIT… AHHH… HOLY SHIT… Evan: Is everyone okay?  How did we survive that fall? Noah: Where the hell are the other three? Evan: They must’ve fallen somewhere else. Grant: This isn’t possible.  We can’t be here. How do we get back? Evan: It’s a long shot…  But there’s a boat over there.  We might be able to use it  to find a way out of here. Noah: It’s better than staying here and doing nothing.  The radios are dead. We’re on our own. Noah: Uh…  Something feels wrong about the water.  It doesn’t feel like water. It doesn’t move the same… Grant: Hold on everyone — it’s getting rough. Noah: I think   we should head back. This doesn’t feel right. Evan: What the hell is that over there? Noah: HOLY SHIT — THERE’S SOMETHING IN THE WATER! Evan: Where the hell did it go?! Noah: WHAT THE FUCK ARE WE GOING TO DO?? Evan: OH SHIT — IT’S BEHIND US! Evan: HOLY FUCK! Noah: SHIT — SHIT — SHIT! Grant: What the fuck is going on…? Grant: Watch where you step — the floor is pretty wet… Evan: Hey Noah… everything okay? Noah: Yeah…  I just thought I saw something in the water… Evan: HOLY SHIT — RUN! RUN!! Noah: We can’t hold the door for much longer! Evan: Is there nothing else to wedge it?! Grant: Shit…  It’s gonna break through— Evan: OH FUCK— Noah: AHHHHHH! Grant: OH SHIT!  Can you see him?! Evan: I can’t   see anything down there… What the hell do we do?! Grant: I think we lost that thing. It looked like a myco-form. Evan: Let’s hope so.  Maybe Noah’s okay. Evan: This place just keeps getting weirder… Grant: Right… let’s take this slow. There may be a way out at the top. Grant: I can see a yellow room.  Maybe we’re close to base. Evan: I doubt it.  This place seems endless. Grant: We’ve seen this place before. It was in that footage we found. Evan: Head down there and we’ll check it out. Grant: You’ve gotta see this… This place is huge.  Looks like a good route to follow. Evan: Keep vigilant.  One of those myco-forms was  found down here by that girl. Grant: What do   you think happened to her? The footage was corrupted. Evan: She must’ve been infected by the Mycothane. I presume she ended up as a myco-form. Grant: Poor soul…  I wonder how many more lives have been taken here. Evan: Can you hear that? Evan:HOLY FUCK — GET OUT OF HERE! Grant: SHIT — RUN! Evan: SHIT — DON’T STOP! DON'T STOP! Evan: JUMP DOWN THERE! Grant: GET OUT OF HERE!! Anonymous: Don’t you think it’s time you woke up? EVAN: DON’T STOP! DON’T STOP! Evan: Quick — through that door! Grant: We can’t lose this thing! Harold: Just keep going! Evan:Where? Harold: Head to the top of that thing! Evan: There’s another fracture opening— Harold: JUMP INTO IT! Evan: Is everyone okay? Harold: We lost Douglas…  That thing got him. Evan: Shit… Grant: I still can’t get a signal back to base… Harold: Just keep moving.  We must be getting closer. Grant: This has got to be the nicest place we’ve seen. Evan: Don’t talk too soon.  Let’s check one of the theatre rooms. Grant: What the fuck…  This can’t be real. It’s playing our tapes? Harold: How is that possible? Scientist (from tape): Initiating tests on myco-fiber samples.  The fibers appear to be stable  outside of the Backrooms. Evan: What the hell is a render error…? Charlie (from tape): You sure this is gonna work? Jordan (from tape): It has to.  That thing tore Mason apart like he was nothing. Charlie (from tape): Yeah… but C4s?  We don’t know if these things can die. Jordan (from tape): Then we find out. Evan: We’ve got another fracture opening over here. Grant: I say we head through. It might be the only way back. Evan: Looks like more yellow rooms… Maybe we’re getting closer— Your. Time.  Is. Up.  What sort of joke is this? Evan: HOLY SHIT— Grant: Are they playing more of our tapes? Evan: They appear to be…  But some of these don’t seem to be ours… RUBY: [barking] Evan: What is all this junk? Jasper: Hello. Evan: OH FUCK—  Jasper?! Evan: Where the hell have you been? It’s been months! Jasper: Don’t you all see?  None of this is real. Grant: Have you lost your mind? Jasper: Do any of you remember waking up this morning? Evan: What are you talking about? Jasper: None of us should be here.  This is all an illusion. WE CANNOT BE HERE?! Harold: What are you talking about, Jasper—? Jasper: Shit…  Look behind you. Evan: OH SHIT—  OH SHIT— WE’RE SURROUNDED! Harold: Everyone take a step back— Grant: CRAP—  EVERYONE STICK TOGETHER! Grant: OH SHIT — WE’VE MADE IT BACK! Jasper: Help!  It’s closing! HELP! Evan: OH SHIT! Grant: Hold on Jasper — I’m coming— Jasper: Help… I’m stuck—  Evan: OH FUCK— OH FUCK— He’s dead…  Why is there no blood…? Evan: What the fuck…  There’s no body inside? Harold: That can’t be possible! Evan: It’s… it’s empty… Evan: Where the hell has everyone gone…? Harold: We've got a bigger problem.  The way out of the facility Evan: What the… Harold: Its gone.. Grant: It gets worse than that.  You have to come see this. Just be careful here. Grant: Has anyone   actually seen the Operations Director before? Evan: No… But he always voices our briefings. Evan: Oh...what the hell happened in here? Grant:I think Jasper may have been onto something. Evan: He can’t have been.  This is ridiculous… Operations Director: The XONE Team have found   Patient X inside the complex. Patient X has been found. ERROR DETECTED.  Unauthorised personnel have  entered the operations rooms.  SYSTEM SHUTDOWN IMMINENT. XONE employees — evacuate the facility. Evan: Looks like this leads to another tunnel system again. Harold: How can our base be connected to the tunnels? Those are inside the ‘Backrooms’… Evan: Let’s try one of these doors… Evan: What…  The… FUCK… Harold: You’ve got to come see this. Grant: What the hell is happening…?  This isn’t like anything we’ve seen before. It’s the creatures. We’ve been seeing them… Are they just… simulations? Harold: What do you think is behind this door? Evan: Just be cautious… Grant: HOLY FUCK — GET TO ANOTHER DOOR! Evan: It’s one of those myco-membris!  Why does it look like that?? Grant: JUST KEEP RUNNING! Evan: What… How…? Grant: Why…  Why do we look like this…? Evan: H-How…? Anonymous: Don’t you think it’s time you woke up? You’ve been here a very long time, trapped in this endless cycle. Every corner you turn,  every shadow that flickers — it all feels so familiar, doesn’t it? But this is not your reality. It’s a prison of your own making.  The world outside is waiting, yet you linger here in the dark. So… What are you waiting for? It’s time to leave… EQUO Employee: Oh shit… It’s happened again… GET A XONE MUG NOW! LIKE AND SUBSCRIBE :)

Due to this I have decided to compile my first Backrooms series into one film. Many of you have seen these before, but I hope you can still enjoy this in the meantime until the next video is ready. Thank you and enjoy!
